title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vascon Engineers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vascon Engineers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!
